arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy could raid Man United for players to join Leicester revival
arts.sum: Although it hasn’t been officially announced at the time of writing, Ruud van Nistelrooy is expected to take over as the new manager of Premier League outfit, Leicester City. The Dutchman has a big job on his hands to revitalise the Foxes, and it may well be that the former Man United ace plunders his […] The post Ruud van Nistelrooy could raid Man United for players to join Leicester revival appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester City buildup, Leicester latest and more: football news – live
arts.sum: Premier League team news and England v USA buildup Share your thoughts to John via email Last night’s Europa League action: Colin gets in touch: You won’t hear from Arne Slot today. As Andy Hunter reported he held his press conference yesterday. I think on TNT on Wednesday he said his family was visiting for a few days. Maybe he’s off to visit the Three Graces, Albert Dock, The Cavern & The Cathedrals - “we’ve got one to spare”. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Robbie Savage's one-word verdict as Leicester City close in on Ruud van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Former Leicester City midfielder Robbie Savage has insisted Manchester United legend Ruud van Nistelrooy is a 'gamble' to replace Steve Cooper. The former United interim manager is believed to be in advanced talks with City which would cement a quick return to Premier League football for the Dutchman.

arts.ttl: Brentford transfer news: Bees 'observe' Serie A star ahead of potential January bid
arts.sum: Brentford reportedly send scouts to 'observe' a Serie A midfield as they weigh up whether to make a move in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy set to be appointed Leicester boss
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is set to be appointed as Leicester City's new boss, replacing Steve Cooper, who was sacked earlier this week.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy set to be appointed Leicester boss
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is set to be appointed as Leicester City's new boss, replacing Steve Cooper, who was sacked earlier this week.

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Tottenham sending scouts to Europa League game – Leicester making trip too
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham are sending scouts to watch tonight’s Europa League clash between FC Midtjylland and Eintracht Frankfurt and will be joined by Leicester City. That’s according to Tipsbladet, who report that Manchester United, Tottenham and Leicester will all have representatives in Central Jutland to watch the European clash.
